scripts.test: node tests/appScope.test.mjs && node tests/apiClient.test.mjs && node tests/mobileRoutes.test.mjs && node tests/mobileApi.test.mjs && node tests/adminLight.test.mjs && node tests/postBlocks.test.mjs && node tests/passwordPolicy.test.mjs && node tests/version.test.mjs
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
